query: SELECT pa.locationCode, wz.code as zoneCode, COUNT(pa.id) as count FROM pickingAllocations pa LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON pa.locationId = wl.id LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id GROUP BY pa.locationCode, wz.code ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute SELECT pa.locationCode, wz.code as zoneCode, COUNT(pa.id) as count FROM pickingAllocations pa LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON pa.locationId = wl.id LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id GROUP BY pa.locationCode, wz.code ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
